sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76726" key="pakta/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πακτά</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παιων-τίς</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παιων-τός</orth>, <sense id="n76726.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πηκτή, -τίς, -τός</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
